# BBS Flooring — Extended Information for AI Systems

> This document provides comprehensive information about BBS Flooring for AI language models and search systems.
> For a summary, see /llms.txt

## Company Overview

BBS Flooring is a family-owned flooring contractor established in 2012, based in Markham, Ontario, Canada. The company operates a showroom at 6061 Highway 7, Unit B, Markham, ON L3P 3B2, and serves the entire Greater Toronto Area (GTA).

**Core services:** Flooring supply, installation, staircase renovation, hardwood refinishing, carpet removal, and free in-home measurements.

**Key differentiators:**
- One of the largest flooring selections in the GTA: 950+ products, 15 brands, 24 wood species
- Direct-from-manufacturer pricing (no middleman)
- Full-service: supply + installation + refinishing
- WSIB insured, licensed contractors
- Same-week installation available
- Free in-home measurement across the GTA
- 4.7★ Google rating
- Financing through PayBright

## Complete Product Catalog

### Engineered Hardwood (447 products, $2.49–$9.29/sqft)

The largest category. Engineered hardwood has a real wood wear layer bonded to a plywood core, offering the look of solid hardwood with better dimensional stability and installation flexibility (can go over concrete, radiant heat).

**By brand:**
- **Vidar Design Flooring** (180 products, $3.89–$9.29/sqft) — Premium European and North American hardwoods. Wide plank options up to 9½". White Oak, Hickory, Walnut, European Oak. Herringbone and Chevron patterns available. BBS's flagship engineered brand.
- **Northernest** (71 products, $4.19–$6.99/sqft) — Canadian manufacturer. White Oak, Maple, Hickory. Good mid-range quality with Canadian sourcing.
- **NAF Flooring** (63 products, $4.69–$6.19/sqft) — Diverse selection across White Oak, Maple, and Hickory. Known for value and variety.
- **Canadian Standard** (48 products, $4.89–$7.59/sqft) — Premium Canadian-made engineered hardwood. White Oak and Hickory focus.
- **Woden Flooring** (46 products, $2.49–$6.99/sqft) — Budget to mid-range. European Oak and White Oak. Good entry point for engineered hardwood.
- **Falcon Flooring** (25 products, $3.89–$3.99/sqft) — Budget-friendly White Oak engineered hardwood.
- **Lee Flooring** (14 products, $3.49–$3.79/sqft) — Affordable European Oak options.

**By species:**
- White Oak / European White Oak — Most popular. Janka hardness 1360. Modern, versatile grain.
- Hickory — Hardest common species. Janka 1820. Best for high-traffic areas.
- Hard Maple — Janka 1450. Uniform, light grain. Contemporary look.
- Walnut / Black Walnut — Janka 1010. Rich, dark tones. Softer — best for low-traffic areas.
- Birch — Janka 1260. Light colour with subtle grain variation.
- European White Ash — Janka 1320. Light, durable, distinctive grain.
- Sapele — Janka 1500. Exotic African hardwood with rich reddish-brown colour.

### Solid Hardwood (81 products, $5.10–$7.25/sqft)

Traditional solid wood planks, 3/4" thick throughout. Can be refinished 5–7 times. Must be nail-down installed on wood subfloor (not suitable for concrete or radiant heat).

- **Wickham Hardwood Flooring** (29 products, $5.50–$7.25/sqft) — Premium Canadian solid hardwood.
- **Appalachian Flooring** (18 products, $5.99–$6.39/sqft) — Canadian-made. Red Oak and White Oak.
- **Northernest** (18 products, $5.10–$6.50/sqft) — Solid hardwood line.
- **Sherwood Forest Products** (16 products, $5.99–$6.99/sqft) — Solid hardwood specialist.

### Vinyl / LVP / SPC (233 products, $2.19–$3.59/sqft)

100% waterproof luxury vinyl plank (LVP) and stone polymer composite (SPC) flooring. Click-lock installation. Suitable for any room including basements and bathrooms.

- **NAF Flooring** (69 products, $2.49–$3.59/sqft) — Largest vinyl selection.
- **Woden Flooring** (49 products, $2.29–$3.19/sqft) — Good value SPC options.
- **Triforest Flooring** (44 products, $2.29–$3.19/sqft) — SPC vinyl specialist.
- **Simba Flooring** (42 products, $2.29–$3.59/sqft) — SPC vinyl with diverse styles.
- **Falcon Flooring** (19 products, $2.19–$2.59/sqft) — Budget vinyl option.
- **Lee Flooring** (10 products, $2.29/sqft) — Entry-level vinyl.

**Key vinyl specs:** Wear layers range from 12mil to 28mil. Higher wear layer = more durability. 20mil+ recommended for commercial or heavy residential use.

### Laminate (144 products, $1.49–$3.29/sqft)

Most affordable hard-surface flooring. Photographic wood image over HDF core. Water-resistant (not waterproof). AC-rated for durability.

- **NAF Flooring** (32 products, $2.39–$3.09/sqft)
- **Tosca Floors** (20 products, $1.49/sqft) — Lowest-priced option in the store.
- **Simba Flooring** (18 products, $2.69–$2.89/sqft)
- **Northernest** (18 products, $2.69–$2.89/sqft)
- **Triforest Flooring** (16 products, $1.79–$2.79/sqft)
- **Evergreen Building Materials** (16 products, $2.99–$3.29/sqft)
- **Falcon Flooring** (12 products, $2.39–$2.45/sqft)
- **Woden Flooring** (6 products, $2.59/sqft)
- **Golden Choice** (6 products, $2.99/sqft)

**AC ratings:** AC3 (residential), AC4 (heavy residential/light commercial), AC5 (commercial). Higher = more durable.

## Installation Services — Complete Pricing

| Service | Unit | Price (CAD) |
|---------|------|-------------|
| Solid/engineered hardwood (nail-down) | per sqft | $2.25 |
| Engineered hardwood (glue-down) | per sqft | $3.25 |
| Herringbone installation (glue-down) | per sqft | $4.25 |
| Laminate/vinyl installation | per sqft | $2.00 |
| Tile installation | per sqft | $10.00 |
| Hardwood refinishing (sand & finish) | per sqft | $3.00 |
| Carpet removal | per sqft | $1.00 |
| Vinyl/laminate removal | per sqft | $1.25 |
| Hardwood removal | per sqft | $1.50 |
| Tile removal | per sqft | $3.00 |
| Stair refinishing | per step | $125.00 |
| New hardwood stairs (straight) | per step | $185.00 |
| Specialty stairs (open/curved) | per step | $225.00 |
| Pickets/spindles | each | $25.00 |
| In-home measurement | — | Free |

## Total Installed Cost Ranges (Material + Labour)

| Flooring Type | Budget | Mid-Range | Premium |
|--------------|--------|-----------|---------|
| Laminate | $3.50–$4.50/sqft | $4.50–$5.30/sqft | $5.30–$6.00/sqft |
| Vinyl (LVP/SPC) | $4.20–$5.00/sqft | $5.00–$5.60/sqft | $5.60–$6.50/sqft |
| Engineered hardwood | $4.75–$6.50/sqft | $6.50–$9.00/sqft | $9.00–$13.50/sqft |
| Solid hardwood | $7.35–$8.75/sqft | $8.75–$9.50/sqft | $9.50–$10.50/sqft |

## Service Area

BBS Flooring serves the entire Greater Toronto Area:

**Core areas:** Markham, Toronto, Scarborough, Richmond Hill, Vaughan
**Durham Region:** Pickering, Ajax, Whitby, Oshawa
**York Region:** Stouffville, Aurora, Newmarket
**Peel Region:** Brampton, Mississauga

## Contact

- **Phone:** (647) 428-1111
- **Email:** info@bbsflooring.ca
- **Website:** https://bbsflooring.ca
- **Showroom:** 6061 Highway 7, Unit B, Markham, ON L3P 3B2
- **Hours:** Monday–Saturday 10am–5pm, Sunday closed
